mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_chat (session_id, state_key, item_index, state_data) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{stateKey}, #{itemIndex}, #{stateData}) ON CONFLICT (session_id, state_key, item_index) DO UPDATE SET state_data = EXCLUDED.state_data

INSERT INTO session_chat (session_id, state_key, item_index, state_data) VALUES
(#{entity.sessionId}, #{entity.stateKey}, #{entity.itemIndex}, #{entity.stateData})
mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM session_chat WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM session_chat ORDER BY session_id
